name: Kabul
description: Afghanistan's capital province, a blend of ancient history and modern urban life.

name: Bamiyan
description: High-altitude province home to the famous Buddha niches and Band-e Amir national park.

name: Herat
description: Afghanistan's third-largest city, a historic Silk Road hub with Persian-influenced culture.

name: Balkh
description: Province containing one of the world's oldest cities and the famous Blue Mosque.

name: Nangarhar
description: Eastern province with a warm climate, lush Jalalabad gardens, and ancient Silk Road sites.

name: Badakhshan
description: Remote northeastern province with lapis lazuli mines and the dramatic Wakhan Corridor.

name: Kandahar
description: The historic capital of the Durrani Empire and spiritual heartland of Pashtun culture.
highlights: Ahmad Shah Durrani tomb;Pomegranate orchards;Arghandab valley
